title: pinus montana subsp. prostrata
intro: Pinus montana subsp. prostrata, also known as the Mountain Pine or Dwarf Mountain Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are extracted from its needles, bark, and cones. The health benefits of Pinus montana subsp. prostrata include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the needles and cones in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and boost the immune system.
